action: Claire moves deliberately through the market, her steps unhurried as she navigates the narrow paths lined with stalls. Her gaze shifts from the vibrant displays to the faces of the people around her, absorbing the lively environment.
transition_path: Claire traverse les allées du marché, s'arrêtant brièvement pour admirer les étoffes et écouter les marchands. Elle continue à marcher, saluant d'autres passants avec un sourire, avant de s'arrêter au centre de l'allée principale, entourée par l'animation du marché.

attitude.attitude_protagoniste: Claire is visibly intrigued and engaged, her curiosity piqued by the vibrant array of fabrics and the bustling atmosphere around her.
attitude.attitude_partenaire: The local vendor maintains a warm and welcoming demeanor, eager to share stories about the fabrics with Claire.
attitude.deplacement: Claire moves deliberately through the market, her steps unhurried as she navigates the narrow paths lined with stalls. Her gaze shifts from the vibrant displays to the faces of the people around her, absorbing the lively environment.
attitude.interaction_continue: Claire and the vendor share a moment of cultural exchange, their conversation punctuated by nods and shared laughter. As she moves on, Claire continues to make small connections, exchanging acknowledging smiles with other market-goers, enhancing her sense of connection to the place.

prompt_video: Set the scene at Marché Kermel in Dakar, Senegal during midday with bright lighting. Place Claire, a woman around 45 years old, in a classic and sober style outfit. Dress her in an off-white linen blouse, light beige cotton trousers, brown leather sandals, and a navy blue canvas shoulder bag. Position her standing near a colorful fabric stall, slightly in profile, gently touching the displayed fabrics with her left hand. Capture her with a curious and amazed expression, her head slightly tilted listening to a warm and welcoming local vendor. Use a wide shot to establish the vibrant and dynamic African environment, emphasizing cultural richness. Employ a slow pan to gradually reveal the bustling market details, enhancing immersion. Keep the camera at eye level for viewer identification. Transition Claire through the market aisles, engaging in an exchange of smiles and small conversations with market-goers, reflecting her connection and serenity as she explores.
prompt_video_fr: Claire explore le Marché Kermel à Dakar, s'arrêtant pour admirer les tissus colorés et discuter avec un vendeur local accueillant. Elle est habillée de manière élégante et sobre, se fondant dans l'atmosphère vibrante du marché. La scène montre sa curiosité et son émerveillement, et souligne sa connexion avec l'environnement dynamique.

outfit_reference.text: Claire porte une tenue confortable et adaptée au climat tropical tout en restant élégante et sobre.

attitude.attitude_protagoniste: Claire est engagée et chaleureuse, montrant une attention sincère à chaque enfant, créant un environnement d'apprentissage interactif et joyeux.
attitude.attitude_partenaire: Le jeune garçon proche de Claire est curieux et attentif, les autres enfants manifestent une vivacité et un enthousiasme contagieux, contribuant à une atmosphère collective de découverte.
attitude.deplacement: Claire reste principalement assise, ajustant sa position légèrement pour inclure chaque enfant dans la conversation. Les enfants se penchent et se redressent, reflétant leur intérêt croissant et leur implication dans l'activité.

prompt_video: Set the scene in a small village school on the outskirts of an African city during a soft, golden afternoon. Place Claire sitting on a wooden bench, slightly turned toward a group of children seated in a circle around her. Claire wears a comfortable yet elegant outfit suitable for the tropical climate: a plain ecru linen blouse, light beige cotton pants, brown leather sandals, and a navy blue canvas shoulder bag. Show Claire reading aloud from an educational book, engaging the children who listen attentively and participate in discussions. Capture Claire's warm and engaging smile, with her eyes sparkling with kindness, as she points at important words in the book. Include a young boy sitting closest to Claire, looking at the book with curiosity, while other children lean forward. Pan the camera slowly to focus on a girl enthusiastically raising her hand, expressing interest and involvement. Maintain a medium shot to highlight Claire's interaction with the community, with a slow lateral tracking shot to create a sense of fluidity and collaboration. Use an eye-level angle to emphasize equality and cooperation between Claire and the community.
prompt_video_fr: Claire est assise dans une petite école de village, entourée d'enfants captivés par sa lecture d'un livre éducatif. Elle porte une blouse en lin blanc cassé, un pantalon en coton beige clair, des sandales marron et un sac bandoulière bleu marine. Les enfants participent activement, et une fillette lève la main avec enthousiasme, créant une atmosphère d'apprentissage joyeux et interactif.

outfit_reference.text: Claire porte une tenue confortable et adaptée au climat tropical tout en restant élégante et sobre.

action: As the scene progresses, Claire shifts subtly in her seat, moving her upper body closer to the table to emphasize her engagement. She places her plate down gently, freeing her hands to express herself more openly while conversing. Her movements are unhurried and fluid, echoing the relaxed atmosphere around them.
transition_path: Claire, tout en parlant, pose son assiette sur la table et se tourne légèrement vers l'homme pour mieux l'écouter. Au fur et à mesure que la conversation évolue, son visage s'illumine d'un rire sincère, et elle se rapproche légèrement de la table, illustrant l'engagement dans l'échange.

attitude.attitude_protagoniste: Claire is engaged and attentive, her posture relaxed yet slightly leaning forward, showing genuine interest in the conversation. Her expression is warm and inviting, with a gentle smile that reflects her curiosity and openness to connecting with her dining partner.
attitude.attitude_partenaire: The community member is friendly and welcoming, maintaining eye contact with Claire, which fosters a sense of trust and camaraderie. He gestures occasionally with his hand, underlining his enthusiasm and involvement in their discussion.
attitude.deplacement: As the scene progresses, Claire shifts subtly in her seat, moving her upper body closer to the table to emphasize her engagement. Both characters lean slightly towards each other, creating a cozy bubble of connection despite the bustling surroundings. Their exchange is punctuated by shared laughter and nods, showcasing a developing rapport and mutual understanding.

prompt_video: Put Claire at a communal outdoor dining area in a coastal West African city during the late afternoon golden sunset. Ensure the area is filled with lush local plants. Claire is wearing a simple yet elegant outfit: a plain off-white linen blouse, light beige cotton trousers, brown leather sandals, and a navy blue canvas shoulder bag. Show her sitting at a table opposite a middle-aged community member with a warm smile. Capture their interaction as they share a homemade meal. Claire holds a plate and listens attentively, smiling, as they exchange stories and anecdotes, creating a genuine connection. Have children playing nearby, adding to the lively yet serene atmosphere. End with Claire slightly turned on her chair, laughing with the man, her plate half-empty. The camera should be fixed at eye level in a medium shot to capture both characters and their immediate environment, emphasizing their connection and engagement.
prompt_video_fr: Claire partage un repas fait maison avec un membre de la communauté dans une ville côtière d'Afrique de l'Ouest, en fin d'après-midi. Elle porte une blouse en lin blanc cassé, un pantalon beige clair, des sandales marron et un sac bleu marine. Ils échangent des histoires, créant une connexion sincère, dans une atmosphère animée mais sereine avec des enfants jouant à proximité.

outfit_reference.text: Claire porte une tenue confortable et adaptée au climat tropical tout en restant élégante et sobre.

action: Claire reste principalement immobile, son regard passant du coucher de soleil à son partenaire, engageant un contact visuel significatif. Lentement, elle se tourne légèrement vers lui, son sourire s'élargissant en un geste de reconnaissance. Le membre de la communauté s'avance doucement pour se tenir à ses côtés, marquant un partage silencieux de l'instant.

Elle sourit, exprime sa gratitude avec un geste de la main sur le cœur, tandis que le membre de la communauté s'avance légèrement pour partager le moment.

attitude.attitude_protagoniste: Claire se tient droite sur la colline, ses yeux fixés sur l'horizon où le soleil descend lentement. Sa posture est détendue, ses bras croisés légèrement devant elle, traduisant une introspection paisible.
attitude.attitude_partenaire: Le membre de la communauté est légèrement en retrait, debout avec une posture ouverte et accueillante, témoignant d'une présence discrète mais solidaire.

prompt_video: Place Claire on the top of a slightly elevated hill overlooking the savannah during twilight, with the sky painted in shades of orange and pink. She stands facing west, with a calm and introspective expression, arms slightly crossed. Dress her in a linen blouse in off-white, a pair of light beige cotton trousers, brown leather sandals, and a navy-blue canvas shoulder bag. Position a local community member a few meters behind her, silently observing the landscape. Use a medium close-up shot with a slight downward angle. Employ a slow forward camera movement to enhance the intimacy of the scene. As the scene progresses, Claire turns slightly towards the community member, smiling serenely, placing a hand on her heart. The community member steps forward, sharing a knowing smile with Claire, conveying mutual understanding and gratitude. Ensure the outfit is depicted exactly as described, with no deviations in color or pattern.
prompt_video_fr: Claire se tient sur une colline surplombant la savane africaine au crépuscule, profitant d'un moment de paix intérieure. Elle porte une blouse en lin blanc cassé, un pantalon en coton beige clair, des sandales en cuir marron, et un sac à bandoulière en toile bleu marine. Un membre de la communauté se tient en retrait, partageant silencieusement cet instant de réflexion avec Claire.
